calendar.matters:
Petition For Change In Corporate Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-03-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Timothy Flaherty for and with Erin Doyle Ebeling.

Judge Wiss disclosed that her Husband shared office sapce, but not cases, with Mr. Flaherty approximately 11 years ago. Over the next few years, he occasionally referred cases to Mr. Flaherty, but not in recent years. To her knowledge there were no Clients in common and they did not share attorney fees. Judge Wiss does not feel that this affects her ability to be fair and impartial to all Parties and their Counsel. Counsel and Ms. Ebeling addressed the Court's concern with regard to notice to all Parties, waiver of accountings by some of the Beneficiaries and not others, whether Wells Fargo ever provided accountings and language in the order. The Petition for Change in Corporate Trustee was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

Petition For Change In Corporate Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-07-2012 Continued To Nov-21-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
